narrative_beat: Confronto visual entre biologia e tecnologia — o cérebro humano e a IA espelhados, separados por uma fronteira dourada de faíscas sinápticas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: both halves in focus, background blurred

subject.primary: split close-up: left half shows warm amber cross-section MRI scan of human brain with glowing synaptic pathways in gold, right half shows crimson digital neural network with glowing nodes in red and amber
subject.focal_point: center dividing line where golden synaptic sparks arc between biological and digital networks
subject.secondary: golden lightning-like connections bridging the two halves at the center seam
props: amber MRI scan layers on left
crimson glowing neural network nodes on right
gold synaptic spark arcs at center
floating orange embers near connection points

environment.atmosphere: clinical yet ominous, a threshold being crossed

composition.rule: perfect vertical split — Ken Burns slow lateral slide left to right
composition.foreground: split brain/neural imagery in crimson and amber occupying center 80% of frame
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white neuroscience lab with equipment, monitors, clinical furniture

lighting.key_light: amber backlight illuminating the brain scan from behind on left side
lighting.fill_light: cold blue-grey desaturated light from lab environment barely touching edges
lighting.rim_light: thin crimson outline around neural network nodes on right side
lighting.mood: scientific horror, the merger of flesh and machine

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: unsettling recognition, the horror of similarity between human and machine

symbolism.primary: the merging of human neural pathways with AI networks symbolizes the blurring boundary between humanity and the beast
symbolism.secondary: golden sparks at the connection point represent the moment consciousness is replicated — or stolen

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
